rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And C
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel the deposition of the person most qualified and custodian of records of the Boeing Co. was continued from December 2 per the parties¿ agreement. If all issues are not resolved before then, by 4:30 p.m. today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing on January 6, 2011 at 9:00am in Department 220. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Raytheon Company¿s motion for terminating sanctions is denied. Terminating sanctions are not commensurate with plaintiffs¿ failure to comply with the prior order. Defendant¿s alternate request for evidence sanctions is granted in part. Plaintiffs are precluded from introducing any evidence at trial or on a law and motion matter regarding any asbestos-containing products attributable to defendant that Mr. Gauger was exposed to that plaintiffs knew about or, through reasonably diligent investigation (but not discovery), would have learned about prior to December 1. Thus, plaintiffs can only establish product identification causation against defendant by evidence that plaintiffs did not know and couldn¿t have known through reasonably diligent investigation until December 1 or later. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS HRUSKA et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling The Custodian Of Records For Medicare To Produce Records Of Dennis L. Hruska
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Designated Defense Counsel¿s motion for order compelling the custodian of records for Medicare to produce records is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH GARZA et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS(B P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order [Redemption Of Insurance Policy Rights]
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, January 6, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order [redemption of insurance policy rights] is denied. Plaintiffs have not shown that the ¿policy rights¿ that they wish to have assigned to them are within the rights that are assignable under CCP 708.510(a). = (220/HEK)
